privileged_info_summary: The task involves a Nuxeo Platform 'Projects' workspace with three documents. Document 'Annual-Report-2023' (File type) and 'Project-Proposal' (File type) are both initially locked by user 'jsmith'. Document 'Q3-Status-Report' (Note type) is initially locked by the Administrator user. The task requires unlocking the two jsmith-owned documents while preserving the Administrator's lock on Q3-Status-Report. The verification logic in verifier.py checks that Annual-Report-2023 and Project-Proposal are unlocked (40 points each) and that Q3-Status-Report remains locked by Administrator (20 points), for a total possible score of 100 points.
